evidence_boundary.pnl_rule: P&L is emitted only when both entry and exit long/short bid/ask quotes are present from trusted intraday OPRA/NBBO rows.
evidence_boundary.readback_is: read-only exact OPRA/NBBO bid/ask coverage and side-aware replay availability for logged execution alternatives
evidence_boundary.readback_is_not: scanner policy, contract-selection permission, broker action, DB mutation, stop/sizing change, or promotion proof

next_evidence_queue.operator_next_step: Use `quote_demands` priority 0/entry rows to import or query trusted same-minute OPRA/NBBO entry quotes before counting replay P&L.
Use `quote_demands` exit rows to import or query trusted OPRA/NBBO exit-window quotes before changing contract selection.
